scripts.lint: node --check scripts/validate-scenarios.mjs && node --check scripts/resolve-live-run-matrix.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-episode-fixtures.mjs && node --check scripts/check-workspace-policy.mjs && node --check scripts/test-workspace-policy.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-reward-fixtures.mjs
scripts.matrix:check: TASK_SET=first-live-run node scripts/resolve-live-run-matrix.mjs --check && TASK_SET=smoke node scripts/resolve-live-run-matrix.mjs --check && TASK_SET=all node scripts/resolve-live-run-matrix.mjs --check
scripts.verify: npm run validate && npm run matrix:check && npm run episode:validate && npm run workspace-policy:test && npm run reward-fixtures:validate
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run verify
